skyforge.UserScope.description: NOTE: This type must live in the service package (not a type alias to an internal package) to satisfy Encore's API schema rules.
skyforge.UserScope.title:
UserScope is the user-facing user-scope object stored in Postgres and returned
by the API.

get.description: logs into Forward server-side with the user's managed credential, sets the resulting Forward session cookies, and redirects to the target page.
get.summary: ForwardSessionBridge consumes a short-lived bridge token on the Forward host,
FrontendAdmin serves the SPA for admin routes.
GetAdminAudit returns audit events (admin only).
GetAdminOIDCSettings returns runtime OIDC settings (admin only).

put.summary: PutAdminOIDCSettings updates runtime OIDC settings (admin only).

get.summary: GetAdminAuthSettings returns runtime authentication settings (admin only).

put.summary: PutAdminAuthSettings updates runtime authentication mode (admin only).

get.description: This endpoint is meant for self-diagnosis: it reports the config actually seen by the running API process (including defaults), plus a list of required fields that are missing.
get.summary:
GetAdminEffectiveConfig returns the effective (non-secret) typed Encore config
(admin only).
ListAdminConfigChangeRuns returns config changes across all users.
GetAdminConfigChangeRun returns one config change run for operators.

post.summary:
ApproveAdminConfigChangeRun marks a rendered change run approved for protected
execution.

ExecuteAdminConfigChangeRun queues an approved change run onto the existing task
engine seam.

get.summary: GetAdminConfigChangeRunLifecycle returns lifecycle details for operators.

post.summary:
RejectAdminConfigChangeRun rejects a protected config change run before
execution.

get.summary:
GetAdminConfigChangeRunReview returns the persisted review payload for
operators.

post.summary:
RollbackAdminConfigChangeRun queues rollback for a previously executed change
run.

UpdateAdminConfigChangeRunStatus updates status or approval state for a config
change run.

RequestAdminForwardTenantRebuild requests a platform-managed Forward org rebuild
for another user.

get.summary: ListAdminForwardTenantRebuildRuns returns reset runs for another user.
GetAdminImpersonateStatus returns current impersonation status.

get.description: credential status (admin only).
get.summary: GetAdminForwardSupportCredential returns the platform Forward support

post.description: support credential including password material (admin only).
post.summary: RevealAdminForwardSupportCredentialPassword returns the platform Forward

get.summary:
GetAdminServiceNowGlobalConfig returns global ServiceNow PDI settings (admin
only).

put.summary:
PutAdminServiceNowGlobalConfig updates global ServiceNow PDI settings (admin
only).

post.summary:
PushAdminServiceNowForwardConfig installs shared ServiceNow app assets (admin
only).

get.summary: GetAdminTeamsGlobalConfig returns global Teams bridge settings (admin only).

put.summary: PutAdminTeamsGlobalConfig updates global Teams bridge settings (admin only).

post.summary:
TestAdminTeamsOutgoing verifies outbound Teams bridge delivery using a provided
webhook URL.

get.description: Data is a short-lived snapshot stored in Redis by Telegraf.
get.summary: ListNodeMetrics returns a lightweight, live view of node metrics (admin only).

GetObservabilitySeries returns compact observability time series for admin
views.
GetObservabilitySlowRequests returns sampled slow request records (admin only).

GetObservabilitySummary returns lightweight native observability signals (admin
only).

GetAdminPlatformOverview returns reservation/reset/profile counts for platform
planning.
ListAdminPlatformReservations returns reservation requests across the platform.

post.summary:
CreateAdminPlatformReservation creates an override or reserved-block reservation
for platform operations.

get.summary:
GetAdminPlatformReservationLifecycle returns lifecycle details for any
reservation.

post.summary:
UpdateAdminPlatformReservationStatus approves, rejects, or cancels a
reservation.

get.summary:
GetAdminPlatformRuntimePolicy returns the global deploy runtime policy used for
KNE deploy admission.

put.summary:
PutAdminPlatformRuntimePolicy replaces the global deploy runtime policy for KNE
admission checks.

get.summary: GetAdminPlatformUserPolicy returns the effective platform policy for a user.

put.summary: PutAdminPlatformUserProfiles replaces the role profile set for a user.
PutAdminPlatformUserQuota replaces the quota override for a user.

get.summary:
GetAdminQuickDeployCatalog returns the editable quick deploy catalog (admin
only).

put.summary: UpdateAdminQuickDeployCatalog updates the quick deploy catalog (admin only).

get.summary:
GetAdminQuickDeployTemplateOptions returns available blueprint templates for
quick deploy curation.

ListAdminAPICatalog returns the discoverable API catalog for RBAC policy
management.
ListAdminUserRoles returns direct and effective RBAC roles for known users.
GetAdminUserAPIPermissions returns explicit per-user API permissions.

put.summary: PutAdminUserAPIPermissions replaces explicit per-user API permissions.

post.summary: UpsertAdminUserRole grants or updates a direct RBAC role for a user.

delete.summary: DeleteAdminUserRole revokes a direct RBAC role from a user.

get.summary: ListAdminSmokeRuns returns recent post-deploy smoke run history (admin only).

post.summary: CreateAdminSmokeRun records a post-deploy smoke run summary (admin only).

get.description: This is intended to answer: "are tasks queued because of real backlog, or because queue event delivery/worker execution is broken?"
get.summary: TaskQueueDiag provides admin diagnostics for the task queue.

post.description: This is an admin-only manual guardrail; the worker also runs an automatic reconciler via cron.

limit.title: Limit caps the number of queued tasks to republish.

post.summary: ReconcileQueuedTasks republishes queue events for tasks stuck in "queued".

post.description: This is an admin-only manual guardrail; the worker also runs an automatic reconciler via cron.

hardMaxRuntimeMinutes.title:
HardMaxRuntimeMinutes marks tasks as failed when they have been running longer
than this.

limit.title: Limit caps the number of running tasks to consider.

maxIdleMinutes.title: MaxIdleMinutes marks tasks as failed when they have had no logs for this long.

post.summary: ReconcileRunningTasks marks tasks that appear stuck in "running" as failed.

post.description: This is a manual safety valve when deployment delete flows leave topology pods behind.

dryRun.title: DryRun previews cleanup candidates without deleting anything.

userScopeId.title: Optional user scope filter. When empty, all known user scopes are considered.

post.summary:
CleanupWorkspacePods force-cleans kne topology pods/resources from workspace
namespaces (admin only).

CreateAdminUser seeds a user in the RBAC/user directory and optionally grants a
role.

post.description: This is intended for development environments where you want to rerun "first-login" bootstrap (Gitea user/provisioning, default user scope, etc).
post.summary: PurgeUser removes a user and their state (admin only).
SyncUserScopes syncs all user scopes from external systems (admin only).

delete.description: If the user owns scopes, use purge instead.
delete.summary: DeleteAdminUser removes a user from the RBAC/user directory.

get.summary: ListUserAPITokens returns metadata for the current user's API tokens.

post.description: NOTE: plaintext token is only returned once in this response.
post.summary: CreateUserAPIToken creates a new API token for the current user.

delete.summary: RevokeUserAPIToken revokes an existing API token.

post.description: NOTE: plaintext token is only returned once in this response.
post.summary: RegenerateUserAPIToken rotates the secret for an existing API token.

get.summary: SessionForwardAuth is a Skyforge SSO gate endpoint used by Traefik forwardAuth.
Reauth clears the current session cookie and redirects back to the login page.
ListAwsSSOAccounts returns accounts available for the current SSO session.
ListAwsSSORoles returns roles for a selected AWS environment.
GetAwsSSOConfig returns the configured AWS SSO start URL and region.

post.summary: LogoutAwsSSO clears any stored AWS SSO tokens.
PollAwsSSO polls for device authorization completion.
StartAwsSSO begins the AWS device authorization flow.

get.summary: GetAwsSSOStatus returns connection status for the authenticated user.
AzurePortalRedirect opens the Azure portal with a login hint.

ListUserContainerlabServers returns the current user's configured Containerlab
BYOL endpoints.

put.summary:
UpsertUserContainerlabServer creates or updates a user-scoped Containerlab
endpoint.

delete.summary: DeleteUserContainerlabServer deletes a user-scoped Containerlab server.

get.summary: ListUserFixiaServers returns the current user's configured Fixia API endpoints.

put.summary: UpsertUserFixiaServer creates or updates a user-scoped Fixia endpoint.

delete.summary: DeleteUserFixiaServer deletes a user-scoped Fixia server.

get.summary:
ListUserNetlabServers returns the current user's configured Netlab API
endpoints.

put.summary: UpsertUserNetlabServer creates or updates a user-scoped Netlab API endpoint.

delete.summary: DeleteUserNetlabServer deletes a user-scoped Netlab server.

get.summary:
GetUserScopeDeploymentNetlabGraph returns a rendered netlab topology graph for a
deployment.

post.description: This is an alternative to local SSH ProxyJump when clients cannot reach the lab network.
post.summary:
NetlabConnect executes `netlab connect` on the Netlab runner host and returns
its output.

get.summary: GetUserScopeNetlab returns the user-scope netlab server selection.

put.summary: UpdateUserScopeNetlab updates the user-scope netlab server selection.

post.summary: RunUserScopeContainerlab triggers a Containerlab run for a user scope.

action.title: up, create, restart, collect, status, down

cleanup.title: for down/restart, remove workdir when true

topologyUrl.title: remote URL (only if netlab supports it)

post.summary: RunUserScopeNetlab triggers a netlab run for a user scope.

authenticated user.

authenticated user.

authenticated user.

PutCurrentUserAzureCredentials saves Azure credentials for the authenticated
user.

principal.

user.

GetCurrentUserGCPCredentials returns GCP credential status for the authenticated
user.

GetCurrentUserIBMCredentials returns IBM Cloud credential status for the
authenticated user.

PutCurrentUserIBMCredentials saves IBM Cloud credentials for the authenticated
user.

get.summary: ListCurrentConfigChangeRuns returns config changes for the current user.

post.summary: CreateCurrentConfigChangeRun creates a new durable config change run.

get.summary:
GetCurrentConfigChangeRun returns one config change run owned by the current
user.

GetCurrentConfigChangeRunLifecycle returns lifecycle details for one config
change run.

post.summary:
RenderCurrentConfigChangeRun validates and normalizes a config change run into a
review payload.

GetCurrentConfigChangeRunReview returns the persisted review payload for one
config change run.
DashboardEvents streams a dashboard snapshot as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

get.description: This is a non-streaming companion to \`/api/dashboard/events\` used by the UI to quickly populate state (and during SSE reconnects).
get.summary: DashboardSnapshot returns the latest dashboard snapshot.
GetDeploymentLifetimePolicy returns deployment lifetime policy used by the UI.

post.description: This enables "SSO" without needing to store or reuse the user's password.
post.summary:
DNSBootstrap provisions a per-user Technitium identity + zone and stores a
long-lived API token in Skyforge.

get.description:
NOTE: Technitium uses localStorage tokens (not cookies). This endpoint serves a tiny HTML page that:

 1. fetches a token from Skyforge Server
 2. stores it in localStorage
 3. redirects to /dns/
get.summary:
DNSSSO bridges Skyforge auth into Technitium DNS by storing a minted token in
localStorage and redirecting.

get.description: The token is stored client-side (localStorage) by the DNS SSO bridge.
get.summary: DNSToken mints a Technitium session token for the current Skyforge user session.

ListUserForwardCollectorConfigs lists Forward collector configurations managed
by Skyforge for the current user.

CreateUserForwardCollectorConfig creates a new Forward collector configuration
and deploys a matching in-cluster collector.

delete.description: It intentionally does NOT delete the Forward-side collector.

DeleteUserForwardCollectorConfig deletes the in-cluster resources for a
collector config and removes it from Skyforge.

GetUserForwardCollectorConfigLogs returns the collector's `clientd.log` (or a
fallback log) for debugging.

post.summary:
RestartUserForwardCollectorConfig restarts the collector Deployment (best-effort
image update).

GetUserForwardCollectorConfigRuntime returns runtime state for a configured
collector.

GetUserForwardCollectorConfigUpdate checks remote registry digest and reports
whether a collector upgrade is available.

post.summary:
UpgradeUserForwardCollectorConfig upgrades a collector deployment to the latest
digest for its current image tag.

get.summary:
ListForwardCollectors lists collectors visible to the authenticated user's
Forward org.

get.description: authenticated Skyforge host and redirects the browser to the Forward-host bridge path for a specific network search target.

password.

feature flags.

feature flags.

rebuild for the current user.

GetCurrentUserCredentials returns the current user's deploy key (public) and
HTTPS token status.

post.summary: RotateCurrentUserDeployKey rotates the user's SSH deploy key.

get.summary: GetAPIHealth returns a summary of database health.

InfobloxConsoleWS provides an in-cluster troubleshooting shell via the managed
Infoblox VM launcher pod.
GetUserInfobloxStatus returns current KubeVirt VM status for managed Infoblox.

post.summary:
WakeUserInfoblox ensures managed Infoblox VM is set to run and waits briefly for
readiness.

get.summary:
GetUserServiceNowConfig returns the current user's ServiceNow demo integration
settings.

put.summary:
PutUserServiceNowConfig stores the current user's ServiceNow demo integration
settings.

post.description: This does not configure ServiceNow CMDB integration (that is per-network and handled elsewhere).
post.summary:
ConfigureForwardServiceNowTicketing configures Forward SaaS to
auto-create/update incidents in ServiceNow.

InstallUserServiceNowDemo installs/configures the ServiceNow Connectivity Ticket
demo into the user's ServiceNow instance.

get.summary:
GetUserServiceNowPDIStatus checks whether the user's ServiceNow PDI is awake (or
likely sleeping).

GetUserServiceNowSchemaStatus checks whether the ServiceNow demo schema is
installed.

post.summary:
StartOrResumeUserServiceNowSetup runs the near-zero-touch ServiceNow setup
workflow.
CancelUserServiceNowSetup marks an active setup run as canceled.

get.summary: GetUserServiceNowSetupStatus returns the latest setup run for the current user.

post.summary:
RotateUserServiceNowTenant rotates the current user's ServiceNow tenant password
and reprovisions linkage.

WakeServiceNowPDI attempts to wake the user's ServiceNow PDI and waits briefly
for it to become responsive.

get.summary: GetUserTeamsConfig returns the current user's Teams bridge settings.

put.summary: PutUserTeamsConfig stores the current user's Teams bridge settings.

post.description: back to the user's configured outbound webhook.
post.summary:
HandleTeamsBridgeEvent executes a Teams-like bridge command and optionally posts
the result

TestUserTeamsOutgoing sends a test message using the current user's configured
webhook.

get.summary: GetNetlabRuns returns recent Netlab runs for a user scope.

get.description:
This endpoint is intended to reduce portal-side polling. It streams a small "snapshot" payload whenever notifications change for the authenticated user.

Query params: - include\_read=true|false (default false) - limit=1..100 (default 50)
get.summary: NotificationsEvents streams notifications as Server-Sent Events (SSE).
GetUserObservabilitySeries returns role-scoped observability time series.

GetUserObservabilitySummary returns role-scoped observability summaries for all
authenticated users.

GetCurrentPlatformAvailability returns the current user's effective platform
policy, quota usage, and class availability.

get.description: This intentionally excludes core platform services so scale-to-zero tools do not pollute the primary system status surface.
get.summary: GetManagedIntegrationsStatus returns subordinate integration runtime state.
GetCurrentPlatformPolicy returns the current user's effective platform policy.

post.summary:
PreflightCurrentPlatformReservation evaluates reservation admission for the
current user without creating a reservation.

get.summary:
ListCurrentPlatformReservations returns reservation requests for the current
user.

post.summary:
CreateCurrentPlatformReservation creates a reservation request for the current
user.

CancelCurrentPlatformReservation cancels a reservation owned by the current
user.

get.summary:
GetCurrentPlatformReservationLifecycle returns lifecycle details for a
reservation owned by the current user.
PublicConfig exposes non-sensitive public UI configuration.

GetQuickDeployCatalog returns the curated one-click quick deploy template
catalog.

post.summary:
RunQuickDeploy provisions a curated kne deployment with managed in-cluster
Forward sync.

get.description:
Uses Docker Registry HTTP API v2 \`\_catalog\`.

Env: - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_URL (required), e.g. [https://ghcr.io](https://ghcr.io) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_USERNAME / SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_PASSWORD (optional) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_SKIP\_TLS\_VERIFY (optional: true/false) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_REPO\_PREFIXES (optional comma-separated prefixes to include)

Query: - q: substring match filter - n: server-side page size for \_catalog
get.summary: ListRegistryRepos returns available repositories from the configured registry.

ListRegistryTags returns tags for a specific repository from the configured
registry.
GetRuns returns recent runs from native Skyforge tasks.

post.summary: CreateRun is a reserved endpoint for admin-triggered native tasks.
CancelRun cancels a queued or running task.

get.description: This is implemented as a raw endpoint so it can hold a long-lived HTTP connection.
get.summary: RunEvents streams task output as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

get.description: The stream is backed by \`sf\_task\_events\` and supports \`Last-Event-ID\` replay.
get.summary:
TaskLifecycleEvents streams structured task lifecycle events as Server-Sent
Events (SSE).
GetRunOutput returns output for a specific native task.
GetCurrentUserSettings returns saved defaults for the authenticated user.

put.summary: PutCurrentUserSettings upserts saved defaults for the authenticated user.

get.summary: ListSnmpTrapEvents returns the current user's trap inbox.

get.description: Query params: - limit=1..1000 (default 200)
get.summary: SnmpTrapEventsStream streams SNMP trap inbox events as Server-Sent Events (SSE).
GetSnmpTrapToken is disabled: SNMPv2c communities are no longer supported.

post.summary: RotateSnmpTrapToken is disabled: SNMPv2c communities are no longer supported.

get.description: By default it returns only events mapped to the current user via \`sf\_syslog\_routes\`. Admins can request unassigned events to help claim sources.
get.summary: ListSyslogEvents returns the syslog inbox for the current user.

get.description: Query params: - limit=1..1000 (default 200)
get.summary: SyslogEventsStream streams syslog inbox events as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

delete.summary: DeleteSyslogRoute deletes a syslog route (admin only).

get.summary: ListSyslogRoutes lists configured source->user mappings (admin only).

put.summary: UpsertSyslogRoute creates/updates a syslog route (admin only).

get.summary: GetTemplates returns available templates for a user scope.

integrations.

post.summary:
SetToolServiceReplicas sets the replica count for a shared subordinate
integration.

get.summary: GetUIConfig returns UI configuration values.

get.description: Query params: - all=true (admin only; default false)

artifact.

CreateUserScopeArtifactFolder creates a "folder" placeholder (zero-byte object
with trailing slash).

delete.summary: DeleteUserScopeArtifactObject deletes a single artifact object.

post.description: This is an object-store-native alternative to the prior \`UploadUserScopeArtifact\` endpoint (which uses Encore's objects SDK and may require bucket subdomain DNS).
post.summary: PutUserScopeArtifactObject writes/overwrites a single artifact object.

UploadUserScopeArtifact uploads or presigns an artifact to the user-scope
bucket.

plan.

get.description: This is used by the Lab Designer "Import from templates" feature.

user-scope/blueprints/external repo.

post.description: (no YAML commit step).

autoDeploy.title: AutoDeploy queues an initial "create" action after creating the deployment.

name.title: Name becomes the Skyforge deployment name (and drives the lab name).

template.title: Template is the filename under TemplatesDir.

templateSource.description: For now, only "user" is supported by this endpoint.

templatesDir.title: TemplatesDir is the repo-relative directory containing the YAML.

CreateKneDeploymentFromTemplate creates a kne deployment pointing at an existing
user-scope template YAML

post.description:
creates a "kne" deployment referencing that template, and (optionally) queues an initial deploy.

This is the first-class in-cluster mode (no netlab server required).

autoDeploy.title: AutoDeploy queues an initial "create" action after creating the deployment.

name.title: Name becomes the Skyforge deployment name (and drives the kne lab name).

template.title: Template is the filename to write under TemplatesDir.

templatesDir.title: TemplatesDir is where we store the YAML inside the user-scope repo.

topologyYAML.title: TopologyYAML is the raw netlab/KNE topology YAML.

CreateKneDeploymentFromYAML persists a netlab/KNE topology YAML into the
user-scope repo,

parameters.description: Alternate casing used by some UI clients.

verbs.

get.description: Intended for “top growers” views (week-over-week, day-over-day) without pulling Forward time series.

earlier one and returns deltas.

for inventory/routing scale.

endpoint.

interface-metrics-history endpoint.

unhealthy-devices endpoint.

unhealthy-interfaces endpoint.

container) for a kne node.

node (best-effort).

on a node.

(Telegraf).

Bit/etc).

"queued" state.

them failed.

get.summary: FrontendLogin serves the SPA for local login routes.

LogoutAll clears the Skyforge cookie and redirects to the landing page (used for
manual "reset").
FrontendManifest serves the PWA manifest.

NautobotLogout clears the Skyforge session cookie and redirects to the Skyforge
landing page.
NautobotLogoutAny handles `/nautobot/logout/*` (including a trailing slash).

NetboxLogout clears the Skyforge session cookie and redirects to the Skyforge
landing page.
NetboxLogoutAny handles `/netbox/logout/*` (including a trailing slash).
FrontendNotifications serves the SPA notifications page.

put.summary: MarkNotificationAsRead marks a notification as read.

limit.title: Limit caps the number of queued tasks to republish.
